title: Kapa Qubit
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol prepares a 96 Agilent plate for qubit. For detailed protocol steps, please see below.
steps_raw: This protocol prepares a 96 Agilent plate for qubit. For detailed protocol steps, please see below.
Transfer 190ul of buffer to column 1, 2 of destination plate
Transfer 198ul of buffer to eventual sample columns of destination plate
10ul of standard 1 to column 1, 10ul of standard 2 to column 2 of destination plate
2ul from samples to sample columns of destination plate
